## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing solutions for Galaxy's organic traffic growth needs.](https://fathom.video/share/uT-UrYje3w2geC3WzTipi7gPzaYFV1za?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Galaxy seeks to improve organic traffic and content distribution, balancing quality research with AI-assisted SEO](https://fathom.video/share/uT-UrYje3w2geC3WzTipi7gPzaYFV1za?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered agency services for content creation, optimization, and distribution across traditional and AI search](https://fathom.video/share/uT-UrYje3w2geC3WzTipi7gPzaYFV1za?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

  - [Next steps involve GrowthX providing B2B finance content examples and potentially scheduling a deeper dive with their VP](https://fathom.video/share/uT-UrYje3w2geC3WzTipi7gPzaYFV1za?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)

## Topics

### Galaxy's Current Content Approach

  - [Research team produces high-quality, technical content (news stories, white papers)](https://fathom.video/share/uT-UrYje3w2geC3WzTipi7gPzaYFV1za?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Basic SEO checklist and distribution (metadata, email, social media)](https://fathom.video/share/uT-UrYje3w2geC3WzTipi7gPzaYFV1za?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Minimal backlinking or outreach to other content providers](https://fathom.video/share/uT-UrYje3w2geC3WzTipi7gPzaYFV1za?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Shifting focus to data-driven marketing KPIs (organic traffic, leads, sales qualified leads)](https://fathom.video/share/uT-UrYje3w2geC3WzTipi7gPzaYFV1za?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
